BrandVisibility.title: Brand Visibility
BrandVisibility.description: Curate the ordered city tiles that lead each brand's home page. Only cities tagged for the brand should appear here.
BrandVisibility.panelHint: {count, plural, =0 {No cities curated} one {# city in rotation} other {# cities in rotation}}
BrandVisibility.noneAddable: Every tagged city is already in the list
BrandVisibility.emptyList: Nothing curated yet — add a city below.
BrandVisibility.untaggedWarning: This city isn't tagged for {brand}. The public {brand} site won't render its tile until you tag it.
BrandVisibility.footnote: Visibility comes from the brand toggle on each city — this page only sets the order shown on the brand home page.

Login.errorNoAccount: We couldn't find a login for this Google account. Ask your administrator to send you an invitation.
Login.errorEmailMismatch: The Google account you chose doesn't match the invitation email. Try again with the correct account.
Login.errorEmailUnverified: Google reports this email as unverified. Verify it in your Google account and try again.
Login.errorGoogleNotConfigured: Google sign-in isn't available on this deployment yet. Use the email + password form.
Login.errorStateInvalid: The sign-in link looks tampered with or expired. Start over.
Login.errorOAuthFailed: Google sign-in didn't complete. Try again or use email + password.
Login.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.

Auth.handoffFailed: Sign-in handoff failed. Returning to login…

AcademyShell.title: Study Platform
AcademyShell.tagline: Courses, lessons, students, and invitations — all in one place.

CommandPalette.tip: Type to search across properties, agents, cities, and more.

ForgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
ForgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address on your account. If it matches, we'll send a reset link.
ForgotPassword.failed: Couldn't submit. Try again in a moment.
ForgotPassword.sentBody: If an account exists for that email, we just sent a reset link. It expires in an hour.

ResetPassword.subtitle: Pick a strong password. You'll be signed in automatically once it's saved.
ResetPassword.hint: Min 12 chars with lowercase, uppercase, and a digit.
ResetPassword.failed: Couldn't reset your password. Request a new link and try again.
ResetPassword.expiredBody: Links are valid for one hour. Request a new one from the Forgot password page.
ResetPassword.notFoundTitle: We couldn't find this reset link
ResetPassword.notFoundBody: The link may be incorrect or was already used. Request a new one.

ChangePassword.title: Change password
ChangePassword.description: Your new password takes effect immediately. Other sessions will continue until their access tokens expire.
ChangePassword.hint: Min 12 chars with lowercase, uppercase, and a digit.

Forbidden.title: You don't have access here
Forbidden.description: This area requires different permissions. If you think this is a mistake, contact your admin.

NotFoundPage.label: Not Found
NotFoundPage.title: Page not found
NotFoundPage.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Overview of your real estate platform
Dashboard.todayDescription: What needs your attention right now.
Dashboard.inquiriesNew: {count, plural, =0 {none new} one {# new} other {# new}}

home.title: People
home.description: Everyone on the platform: team, agents, students.

kpi.pendingInvites: {count, plural, =0 {no pending invites} one {# pending invite} other {# pending invites}}
kpi.noLogin: {count, plural, =0 {all linked} one {# without login} other {# without login}}

overlap.title: Email overlap across pools
overlap.body: {count, plural, =0 {No overlap.} one {# email appears in more than one pool.} other {# emails appear in more than one pool.}}

invitations.description: Pending invites for team, agents, and Academy students.

access.headline: Account access
access.description: Whether this agent can sign in to the admin platform.
access.linkedHelper: This agent has an Admin login linked to their profile.
access.pendingHelper: An invitation is in flight. They haven't signed in yet.
access.noLoginHelper: This agent has no login. Send an invitation to grant access.
access.expiredHelper: The previous invitation expired. Send a fresh one to retry.
access.bouncedHelper: The invitation email bounced. Verify the address before resending.

Content.title: Content
Content.description: Articles, academy courses, and student access at a glance.

completeness.title: Locale completeness
completeness.description: How many entries are fully populated per language. Filled = every required localized field has a non-empty value.

enQueue.title: Missing English
enQueue.description: Entries with at least one English field empty. Click to open the editor in EN.

home.title: Catalog
home.description: Properties, developers, and testimonials at a glance.

kpi.propertiesSub: {count, plural, =0 {none available} one {# available} other {# available}}
kpi.developersSub: {count, plural, =0 {none featured} one {# featured} other {# featured}}

brandVisibility.title: Brand homepages
brandVisibility.description: Cities curated for each brand's landing page rotation.

Properties.title: Properties
Properties.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this property and all its images.
Properties.imageUploadFailed: Saved but image upload failed. Edit to retry.

Developers.title: Developers
Developers.imageUploadFailed: Saved but logo upload failed. Edit to retry.
Developers.rebuildCountsHint: Recompute project counts for every developer from live properties.
Developers.rebuildCountsClean: All counts already correct ({checked} developers checked)

Agents.title: Agents
Agents.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this agent. Properties assigned to this agent will be unassigned.
Agents.imageUploadFailed: Saved but photo upload failed. Edit to retry.
Agents.deactivateConfirmDescription: They will lose access to my-listings and my-inquiries until reactivated. The agent record stays in place; properties remain assigned.

Invitations.inviteDescription: Create the agent profile and email them a link to set up their login. They can sign in with Google or set a password.
Invitations.sentEmailFailed: Agent created for {email}, but the email didn't send. Resend it from the Invitations list.
Invitations.sendInviteDescription: We'll email {email} a link to set up their login. It's valid for 7 days. You can revoke or resend it from the Invitations list.
Invitations.listDescription: Pending and past invitations. Resend or revoke from here.
Invitations.resendEmailFailed: Token regenerated but email didn't send. Try again.
Invitations.revokeDescription: The current link stops working immediately. You can send a fresh invitation afterwards.
Invitations.expiresIn: Expires {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}

AcceptInvite.subtitle: You've been invited to join Transylvania Grand Estate. Choose how you'd like to sign in.
AcceptInvite.hint: Min 12 chars with lowercase, uppercase, and a digit.
AcceptInvite.failed: Couldn't complete your invitation. Try again or ask your administrator for help.
AcceptInvite.expiredBody: Invitations are valid for a limited time. Ask your administrator to send you a fresh link.
AcceptInvite.notFoundBody: The link may be incorrect, or it was already used. Reach out to your administrator for a new one.
AcceptInvite.alreadySignedInBody: You're signed in as {currentEmail}. This invitation is for {inviteEmail}. Sign out first to accept it.

Cities.title: Cities
Cities.imageUploadFailed: Saved but image upload failed. Edit to retry.

FinancialIndicators.title: Indicators
FinancialIndicators.description: Macro rates driving the mortgage calculator.
FinancialIndicators.eurRonDescription: Pulled from BNR. Click Sync to refresh.

Users.title: Users
Users.addWithPasswordHint: Create the account directly with a password — break-glass only; prefer Invite.
Users.inviteUserDescription: Send an invitation email. The recipient sets their own password (or signs in with Google) when they accept.
Users.inviteAgentHint: AGENTs are invited from the Agents page so the sales-agent profile is created in one step.
Users.newUserDescription: Creates a new admin account. The user can change their password after first login.
Users.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account
Users.cannotDemoteSelf: You cannot demote yourself from SUPER_ADMIN
Users.cannotSuspendSelf: You cannot suspend your own account
Users.noUnlinkedAgents: No unlinked agents available. Create one first from Agents.
Users.agentLinkRequiredForAgentRole: AGENT role requires linking a sales-agent record.
Users.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the admin account. They will lose all access immediately.
Users.passwordResetQueued: Password reset queued — email retry pending
Users.lifecycleHint: Lifecycle actions take effect immediately and are audited.
Users.bulkAppliedToast: {count, plural, one {# user updated} other {# users updated}}

AuditLogs.title: Audit Log
AuditLogs.description: Append-only record of mutating admin actions.
AuditLogs.empty: No audit entries match your filters yet.
AuditLogs.historyEmpty: No history recorded for this entity yet.
AuditLogs.healthFailures: audit writes have failed since last restart

Profile.title: My Profile
Profile.description: Your sales-agent profile visible on the public site.
Profile.noAgentLinked: No agent linked to your account
Profile.askAdmin: Ask an administrator to link your login to a sales-agent record before editing your profile.
Profile.contactDetailsDescription: Name and phone shown on your agent page.
Profile.bioDescription: Short introduction shown next to your listings.
Profile.photoDescription: Square image, at least 400×400. Replaces the current photo on save.

Articles.title: Articles
Articles.confirmUnpublishDescription: The article will be hidden from the public site. You can re-publish it any time.
Articles.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the article and its cover image is no longer referenced.

articleForm.basicsDescription: Slug, headline, and the short summary that runs on cards and search results.
articleForm.slugHelper: Lowercase letters, digits, and dashes. Public URLs point here; changing it after publish breaks bookmarks.
articleForm.metadataDescription: Hero image, taxonomy, and byline. The cover renders 16:9 on the article page and as a thumbnail in lists.
articleForm.coverImageHelper: Paste a hosted image URL. JPEG, PNG, or WebP. Aim for at least 1600×900.
articleForm.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter
articleForm.authorAvatarHelper: Square headshot, ideally at least 200×200. Optional — initials fall back when omitted.
articleForm.readTimeHelper: Optional. Leave empty to auto-estimate from the body length.
articleForm.contentDescription: Markdown is supported. Use the Preview tab to sanity-check rendering before saving.
articleForm.publishingDescription: Drafts are invisible to the public site. Switching to Published stamps the publish time server-side.

Counties.title: Counties
Counties.newCountyDescription: Romanian county (județ). Code is the ISO 3166-2 suffix.
Counties.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this county. Cities linked to it will be affected.
Counties.editCountyDescription: Update name, slug, code, or coordinates. Slug changes break public URLs that reference the county.

BankRateForm.title: Bank Rate Information
BankRateForm.insuranceRateHint: Monthly life insurance as % of outstanding balance

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.irccHint: IRCC changes quarterly (Jan, Apr, Jul, Oct). Update manually.

CityForm.title: City Information
CityForm.name: Name
CityForm.brandsHelper: Choose which sites surface this city.

Common.discardDescription: Your edits on this page will be lost.
Common.emptySearchDescription: No matches for "{query}". Try a different search.
Common.inquiriesKanbanLabel: Inquiries kanban — three columns (new, read, archived) of draggable cards
Common.errorDescription: We couldn't load this. Retry, or refresh the page if the problem persists.
Common.notFoundDescription: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
Common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
Common.dragDrop: Drag & drop or click to upload
Common.fileFormats: JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF up to 10MB
Common.dragDropImages: Drag & drop images or click to upload

tagsInput.placeholder: Type a tag and press Enter
tagsInput.helper: Press Enter or comma to add. Backspace to remove the last.

courses.listDescription: Manage the study platform's courses and lessons.
courses.lessonCount: {count, plural, =0 {No lessons} one {# lesson} other {# lessons}}
courses.selectAllAria: Select all courses on this page
courses.emptyDescription: Create the first one to get started.
courses.deleteImpact: This will permanently remove {lessonCount, plural, =0 {no lessons} one {# lesson} other {# lessons}} and revoke active access for {studentCount, plural, =0 {no students} one {# student} other {# students}}. This cannot be undone.
courses.bulkDeleteTitle: Delete {count, plural, one {# course} other {# courses}}?
courses.createDescription: Create an empty course. Add lessons from the course detail page after saving.
courses.editDescription: Update metadata, status, or sort key. Lesson reordering happens on the course detail page.
courses.notFoundDescription: We couldn't find that course. It may have been deleted or the URL is wrong.
courses.detailSummary: {lessonCount, plural, =0 {No lessons} one {# lesson} other {# lessons}} · {status} · {visibility}
courses.duplicateDescription: Creates a fresh draft with the same metadata. The clone starts unpublished.
courses.duplicateSlugHelper: Lowercase letters, digits, and dashes. Must be unique across the academy.
courses.duplicateCopyLessonsHelper: Clone every lesson with the same order. Each cloned lesson starts as a draft.

courseForm.basicsDescription: Slug, titles, and the course description. Romanian is the primary language — translations can ship after launch.
courseForm.slugHelper: Lowercase letters, digits, and dashes. Public URLs point here; changing it after launch breaks bookmarks.
courseForm.coverImageUrlHelper: Paste an already-hosted URL. Once the course is saved, a drag-and-drop uploader replaces this input.
courseForm.coverImageUploadHelper: Uploads save immediately — no need to click Save for the image to stick; that's just for the rest of the metadata.
courseForm.coverImageStagedHelper: Optional. The image uploads after the course is created.
courseForm.accessDescription: Who can open this course. Public = any authenticated academy user can browse it from the catalog; Enrolled = only students with a matching grant (wildcard or per-course).
courseForm.visibilityHelper: Choose Public for intro content anyone with an academy account can read. Choose Enrolled for gated courses assigned by an admin.
courseForm.publishingDescription: Status controls whether enrolled students see this course. Order is the sparse sort key used by listings — move it inside a gap (e.g. 15) to slot between two neighbours without rewriting everyone.

lessons.heading: Lessons
lessons.hint: Drag the handle on the left to reorder. Click a title to edit.
lessons.empty: No lessons yet. Add the first one.
lessons.deleteDescription: This removes the lesson permanently. Students lose access immediately.
lessons.reorderDisabledHint: Drag-reorder is disabled here; use “Move to position…” for cross-page moves.
lessons.moveDescription: Enter the target position (1–{total}). The course renumbers automatically after the move.

lessonForm.createDescription: Order pre-filled to the next sparse slot ({order}). Adjust to insert between existing positions, or reorder by drag-and-drop on the course detail page after save.
lessonForm.editDescription: Changing the slug breaks any external deep link into this lesson. Reorder via drag-and-drop on the course detail page, or nudge the sparse int here for fine control.
lessonForm.notFoundDescription: We couldn't find that lesson. It may have been deleted or the URL is wrong.
lessonForm.basicsDescription: Slug, position, type. Slug is unique per course — pick something descriptive; changing it later breaks deep links into this lesson.
lessonForm.orderHelper: Drag-and-drop rewrites this; set manually to squeeze between two existing lessons (e.g. 15 between 10 and 20).
lessonForm.videoDurationHelper: For video lessons only. Enter the duration in seconds (up to 4 hours). For text lessons, reading time is computed from the content automatically.
lessonForm.videoUrlHelper: Required for video lessons. Paste the share URL or the embed URL — it gets normalized to the privacy-friendly embed host before saving.
lessonForm.copyDescription: Title, excerpt (short blurb shown in the lesson list), and content. Content is Markdown — the academy reader renders it with react-markdown + GFM.
lessonForm.publishingDescription: Flip the status to hide or surface this lesson in the student view. Delete is a separate destructive action on the lesson list.

students.listDescription: Invite new students and manage their course access.
students.emptyDescription: Invite your first student to get started.
students.bulkGrantAction: Grant access to {count, plural, one {# student} other {# students}}
students.verificationDescription: This student hasn't clicked their verification link yet. Resend to drop a fresh one in their inbox.
students.enrollmentsDescription: Grant per-course access, or a wildcard for all current and future courses. Revoke hides the course from the student on their next request.
students.enrollmentsWildcardWarning: This student has a wildcard enrollment — they see every published course. Revoke the wildcard first to apply per-course access.
students.invitationsDescription: Every invitation issued to this email — useful to trace where the account came from and whether any are still pending.
students.dangerDescription: Deleting a student removes their account, enrollments, linked sign-in methods, and reset tokens. Their email becomes available for a new invitation. Reserved for SUPER_ADMIN.
students.dangerDeleteDescription: Removes the student and cascades to enrollments and linked identities. Cannot be undone.
students.passwordResetTitle: Send a password reset link to {name}?
students.passwordResetDescription: We'll email a 1-hour link to {email}. Any existing reset links will stop working.
students.suspendDescription: Existing sessions stop immediately. The student sees a clear message at login. Reactivate from this same page when ready.

bulkGrant.title: Grant access to {count, plural, one {# student} other {# students}}?
bulkGrant.description: Pick a course (or wildcard for all current and future courses). Already-enrolled students will be skipped.
bulkGrant.submit: Grant to {count, plural, one {# student} other {# students}}

overview.title: Academy
overview.description: How the study platform is doing this week. Tap a tile to drill in.
overview.topCoursesDescription: By total completions across the catalog.
overview.topCoursesEmpty: Nothing completed yet — check back as students finish lessons.
overview.recentActivityDescription: Latest starts and completions across all courses.

courseStats.title: Performance
courseStats.description: How students are moving through this course. Counts include wildcard enrollments.
courseStats.avgFromCompleters: based on {count, plural, one {# student} other {# students}}

lessonAttachments.title: Attachments
lessonAttachments.description: Files students can download alongside this lesson — handouts, slide decks, exercise zips. PDF, ZIP, PPT/PPTX, DOC/DOCX, TXT up to 25 MB each.
lessonAttachments.confirmDeleteDescription: Removes the file from this lesson. Students lose access immediately.

studentProgress.progressDescription: How far this student has gotten through each accessible course. Click a row to expand the per-lesson breakdown.
studentProgress.progressEmpty: Nothing to show — this student has no published courses they can open yet.
studentProgress.lessonsEmpty: No published lessons in this course.
studentProgress.markCompleteTitle: Mark every published lesson as completed?
studentProgress.markCompleteDescription: Stamps `completedAt` on every lesson the student hasn't finished yet. Use for offline / 1:1 completions.
studentProgress.resetProgressTitle: Reset all progress for this course?
studentProgress.resetProgressDescription: Deletes the student's lesson-progress rows for this course. Course access stays — they restart from the first lesson on next visit.

invite.title: Invite a student
invite.description: Send them an email with a sign-up link. They'll choose a password on first use.
invite.coursePlaceholder: Pick a course or grant all

bulk.defaultLocaleHelper: Used when a CSV row's third column is empty.
bulk.courseHelper: Applied to every row in the batch.
bulk.csvHelper: Format: email[,name[,locale]]. A header row ("email,name,...") is detected and skipped.

invitations.listDescription: Every invitation issued. Resend when an email bounced or the student lost the link. Revoke to invalidate the pending token without deleting the record.
invitations.emptyDescription: No invitations match the current filter.
invitations.revokeDescription: The pending token stops working. The record stays for audit — you can still see it in the Revoked filter.
invitations.copyLinkDescription: Generates a new one-shot URL and copies it to your clipboard. The previous email link will stop working.
invitations.bulkRevokeTitle: Revoke {count, plural, one {# invitation} other {# invitations}}?

toasts.invitationEmailFailed: Invitation created but email delivery failed — resend from the invitations list.
toasts.passwordResetMailFailed: Reset created — but email delivery failed
